ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique country identifier */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country belongs */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region where the country belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique category identifier */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the food category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_data" (
  "data_id" TEXT /* Unique data identifier */,
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the countries table */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the food categories table */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Consumption of the food category in the country */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" TEXT /* Unique statistic identifier */,
  "country_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the countries table */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate in the country */,
  "undernourishment_rate" REAL /* Undernourishment rate in the country */,
  "confirmed_cases" REAL /* Number of confirmed cases of diseases */,
  "deaths" REAL /* Number of deaths due to diseases */,
  "recovered" REAL /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" REAL /* Number of active cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "info_id" TEXT /* Unique information identifier */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the food categories table */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving of the food category */,
  "proteins" REAL /* Proteins per serving of the food category */,
  "fats" REAL /* Fats per serving of the food category */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving of the food category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique user identifier */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique permission identifier */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table for which the permission is granted */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Read permission for the table */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Write permission for the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" TEXT /* Unique visualization identifier */,
  "data_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the food data table */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (bar chart, line chart, etc.) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique report identifier */,
  "data_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the food data table */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (pdf, excel, etc.) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
